symbols.description: Symbols to compute quant features for (default: ["BTC/USDT", "ETH/USDT"])

defaultTimeframe.description: Default OHLCV timeframe for indicator computation (default: "15m")

ohlcvLookback.description: Number of OHLCV candles to fetch for indicator computation (default: 300)

windowMs.description: Rolling window in ms for CVD and trade flow (default: 300000 = 5m)

largeTradeThresholdUsd.description: Trade size threshold in USD to classify as a large trade (default: 500000)

spreadHistoryLength.description: Number of spread samples to maintain for Z-score calculation (default: 100)

maxKellyFraction.description: Maximum fraction of raw Kelly to use for position sizing (default: 0.25)

maxDrawdownHalt.description: Drawdown fraction at which position sizing returns 0 (default: 0.20)

maxPositionRiskPct.description: Maximum fraction of account to risk per position for VaR cap (default: 0.02)

window.description: Number of periods for rolling Hurst R/S calculation (default: 100)

ttlMs.description: Feature vector cache TTL in milliseconds (default: 1000)
